name: minicluster-stress
description: Stress and load tests for MiniCluster API (Go + .NET)

scripts.stress:all: npm run stress:auth && npm run stress:api-read && npm run stress:services && npm run stress:metrics
scripts.report: k6 run --out json=results.json scripts/api-read.js && k6 inspect --summary-trend-stats 'p(90),p(95),p(99)'
